message:
Thanks for getting The Nuke! Here's how to install:

1. Download the ZIP from the button below
2. Unzip the file
3. Open chrome://extensions in Chrome
4. Enable Developer Mode (top right)
5. Click 'Load unpacked' and select the unzipped folder
6. Press Alt+Shift+X to test!

Need help? Open an issue at https://github.com/oimos/thenuke/issues
